source_pr.title: domain: Fix data race
source_pr.body: Using MockReloadFailed  leads to data race. Now fix it.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: domain: Fix data race.
